<!-- GENERATED by sphinxpress. Do not edit by hand. -->

<h1>Source code for booktx.acceptance</h1><div class="highlight"><pre>
<span></span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Translation-record acceptance service.</span>

<span class="sd">Centralizes the validate-and-persist flow that was duplicated between the</span>
<span class="sd">``translate insert`` (batch) and ``translate set-record`` (single-record)</span>
<span class="sd">commands. Both commands used to re-implement the same steps: look up the</span>
<span class="sd">source view, validate each record against the current context, bail on the</span>
<span class="sd">first ERROR finding, then mutate the translation store with a shared</span>
<span class="sd">timestamp and refresh the status snapshot.</span>

<span class="sd">This module owns the pure workflow:</span>

<span class="sd">1. Resolve each submitted record id against the source index (raising</span>
<span class="sd">   :class:`booktx.config.BooktxError` for duplicate / unknown / out-of-task</span>
<span class="sd">   ids, which the CLI renders exactly like any other user-facing error).</span>
<span class="sd">2. Load the translation context **once** and validate every record against it.</span>
<span class="sd">3. If any validation produced an ERROR finding, raise</span>
<span class="sd">   :class:`SubmissionValidationError` carrying those findings — the store is</span>
<span class="sd">   not touched.</span>
<span class="sd">4. Otherwise mutate the store atomically with one shared timestamp and return</span>
<span class="sd">   an :class:`AcceptResult` describing the post-accept progress for the first</span>
<span class="sd">   affected chapter.</span>

<span class="sd">The CLI wrappers parse options, call :func:`accept_translation_records` (or</span>
<span class="sd">:func:`accept_one_record`), then render the result. Console output is</span>
<span class="sd">intentionally not produced here so the service is unit-testable without</span>
<span class="sd">Typer/Rich.</span>
<span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

<span class="c1"># ruff: noqa: E501</span>

<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">__future__</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">annotations</span>

<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">dataclasses</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">dataclass</span>
<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">typing</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">TYPE_CHECKING</span>

<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.config</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">load_translation_store</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">write_translation_store</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span>
<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.glossary_match</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">live_mandatory_glossary_sha256</span>
<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.io_utils</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">utc_timestamp</span>
<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.models</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">TranslatedRecord</span>
<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.progress</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">count_words</span>
<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.termbase_tasking</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">applicable_termbase_sha256_for_record_sources</span>
<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.translation_store</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">ensure_store_record</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">upsert_translation_version</span>
<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.validate</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">Severity</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">load_validation_context</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">validate_record_pair</span>
<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.versioning</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">resolve_current_version</span>

<span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">TYPE_CHECKING</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.models</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">TranslationTask</span>
    <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.status</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">StatusBundle</span>
    <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.validate</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">Finding</span>


<span class="n">__all__</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;SubmittedRecord&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;AcceptResult&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;SubmissionValidationError&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;validate_submitted_records&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;accept_translation_records&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;accept_one_record&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">]</span>

<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.acceptance.SubmittedRecord">[docs]</a>
<span class="nd">@dataclass</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">slots</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">SubmittedRecord</span><span class="p">:</span>

<div class="viewcode-block" id="AcceptResult">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.acceptance.AcceptResult">[docs]</a>
<span class="nd">@dataclass</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">slots</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">AcceptResult</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Post-accept progress for the first affected chapter.</span>

<span class="sd">    ``chapter_id`` is empty when the accepted record(s) could not be mapped to</span>
<span class="sd">    a chapter; the CLI treats that as &quot;no chapter line to print&quot;.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">accepted_records</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span>
    <span class="n">target_words</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span>
    <span class="n">version_ref</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">chapter_title</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">records_translated</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
    <span class="n">records_total</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
    <span class="n">records_remaining</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="SubmissionValidationError">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.acceptance.SubmissionValidationError">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">SubmissionValidationError</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="ne">Exception</span><span class="p">):</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Raised when one or more submitted records failed ERROR-level validation.</span>

<span class="sd">    Carries the ERROR findings so the CLI can render them with the existing</span>
<span class="sd">    submission-failure renderer. The translation store is never written when</span>
<span class="sd">    this is raised.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

<div class="viewcode-block" id="SubmissionValidationError.__init__">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.acceptance.SubmissionValidationError.__init__">[docs]</a>
    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="fm">__init__</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">findings</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">])</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">findings</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">findings</span>
        <span class="nb">super</span><span class="p">()</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="fm">__init__</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;submission failed validation&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span></div>
</div>



<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_error_findings</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">findings</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">])</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">]:</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="n">f</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">f</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">findings</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">f</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">severity</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">Severity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ERROR</span><span class="p">]</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_resolved_submission_version</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">proj</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">task</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">TranslationTask</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">submission_translation_version</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Resolve the authoritative version for this write.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">version_ref</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">translation_version</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">task</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">translation_version</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
        <span class="k">else</span> <span class="n">resolve_current_version</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">proj</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">version_ref</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">submission_translation_version</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">submission_translation_version</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">version_ref</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">subject</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;task </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">task_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> version </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">version_ref</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">task</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">translation_version</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
                <span class="k">else</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;current active version </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">version_ref</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="s2">&quot;submission_translation_version_mismatch&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="s2">&quot;submission translation_version &quot;</span>
                <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">submission_translation_version</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> does not match </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">subject</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">version_ref</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_validate_task_profile</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">proj</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">task</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">TranslationTask</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">submission_profile</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="n">selected</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">proj</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">profile</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">task</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">profile</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">profile</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">selected</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;task_profile_mismatch&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;task </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">task_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> belongs to profile </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">profile</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">, but selected profile is </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">selected</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="ow">or</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s1">&#39;&lt;none&gt;&#39;</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">submission_profile</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">submission_profile</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">selected</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;submission_profile_mismatch&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;submission profile </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">submission_profile</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> does not match selected profile </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">selected</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="ow">or</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s1">&#39;&lt;none&gt;&#39;</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_enforce_applicable_termbase_freshness</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">proj</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">task</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">object</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Block stale tasks whose applicable termbase snapshot changed.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="kn">import</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">warnings</span>

    <span class="n">mandatory_stored</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">getattr</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">task</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;mandatory_glossary_sha256&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">mandatory_stored</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
        <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">live_mandatory_glossary_sha256</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">proj</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">mandatory_stored</span>
    <span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;task_context_policy_stale&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;task </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="nb">getattr</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">task</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s1">&#39;task_id&#39;</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s1">&#39;&lt;unknown&gt;&#39;</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> predates mandatory &quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;glossary changes; create a fresh task before inserting translations&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">stored</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">getattr</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">task</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;applicable_termbase_sha256&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">stored</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">warnings</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">warn</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;task predates applicable_termbase_sha256 fingerprinting; &quot;</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;recreate the task to enable stale-termbase enforcement&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">stacklevel</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">2</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">return</span>
    <span class="n">records</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">getattr</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">task</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;records&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[])</span>
    <span class="n">record_sources</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span><span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">record</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">records</span><span class="p">}</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">applicable_termbase_sha256_for_record_sources</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">proj</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">record_sources</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">stored</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;task_context_policy_stale&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;task </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="nb">getattr</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">task</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s1">&#39;task_id&#39;</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s1">&#39;&lt;unknown&gt;&#39;</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> predates applicable &quot;</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;termbase changes; create a fresh task before inserting translations&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>


<div class="viewcode-block" id="validate_submitted_records">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.acceptance.validate_submitted_records">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">validate_submitted_records</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">proj</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">bundle</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">StatusBundle</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">submitted</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">SubmittedRecord</span><span class="p">],</span>
    <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">task</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">TranslationTask</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">enforce_task_membership</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Validate submitted records, raising BooktxError on id problems.</span>

<span class="sd">    Context is loaded exactly once. Returns all findings (any severity); the</span>
<span class="sd">    caller decides whether ERROR findings should block the store write.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">source_by_id</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">bundle</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">index</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_by_id</span>
    <span class="n">source_chunks</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">bundle</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">index</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_chunks</span>
    <span class="n">allowed_ids</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span><span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">record</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">records</span><span class="p">}</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">task</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="kc">None</span>

    <span class="n">task_context_view_path</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">context_view_path</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">task</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">context_view_path</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
        <span class="k">else</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">task</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">_enforce_applicable_termbase_freshness</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">proj</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">task</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">try</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">context</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">load_validation_context</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">proj</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">context_view_path</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">task_context_view_path</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">except</span> <span class="ne">FileNotFoundError</span> <span class="k">as</span> <span class="n">exc</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;missing_task_context_view&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;task context view is missing: &quot;</span>
            <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">task_context_view_path</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">. Recreate the task or restore the snapshot.&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span> <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">exc</span>
    <span class="k">except</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span> <span class="k">as</span> <span class="n">exc</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;invalid_task_context_view&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;task context view is invalid: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">exc</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span> <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">exc</span>
    <span class="n">findings</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="n">seen_ids</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">set</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">set</span><span class="p">()</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">item</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">submitted</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">record_id</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">item</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">record_id</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">seen_ids</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="s2">&quot;duplicate_record_id&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;duplicate record id in submission: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">seen_ids</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">add</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">record_id</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">source_by_id</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;unknown_record_id&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;unknown source record id: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">enforce_task_membership</span>
            <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">allowed_ids</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
            <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">record_id</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">allowed_ids</span>
        <span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="s2">&quot;record_not_in_task&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;record </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> is not part of task </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">task_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>  <span class="c1"># type: ignore[union-attr]</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">source_view</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">source_by_id</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">]</span>
        <span class="n">translated</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">TranslatedRecord</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nb">id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">target</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">item</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">source_chunk</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">source_chunks</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">source_view</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">]</span>
        <span class="n">source_record</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">next</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">record</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">record</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">source_chunk</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">records</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">record_id</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">findings</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">extend</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">validate_record_pair</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">source_record</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">translated</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">source_chunk</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">context</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">findings</span></div>



<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_write_accepted</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">proj</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">bundle</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">StatusBundle</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">submitted</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">SubmittedRecord</span><span class="p">],</span>
    <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">version_ref</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">task</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">TranslationTask</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">tuple</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Persist accepted records atomically and return timestamp plus version_ref.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">source_by_id</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">bundle</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">index</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_by_id</span>
    <span class="n">updated_at</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">utc_timestamp</span><span class="p">()</span>
    <span class="n">store</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">load_translation_store</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">proj</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">store</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_sha256</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">bundle</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">snapshot</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_sha256</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">item</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">submitted</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">source_view</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">source_by_id</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">item</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="p">]</span>
        <span class="n">record</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ensure_store_record</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">store</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">item</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">source</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">source_view</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">source_sha256</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">source_view</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_sha256</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">upsert_translation_version</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">record</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">version_ref</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">item</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">updated_at</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">updated_at</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">baseline_ref</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">baseline_ref</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">task</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">baseline_sha256</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">baseline_sha256</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">task</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">context_view_sha256</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">context_view_sha256</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">task</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
            <span class="p">),</span>
            <span class="n">context_view_path</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">context_view_path</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">task</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">context_notes_scope</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">context_notes_scope</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">task</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">context_target_chapter_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">context_target_chapter_id</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">task</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
            <span class="p">),</span>
            <span class="n">context_notes_through_chapter_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">context_notes_through_chapter_id</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">task</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
            <span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">write_translation_store</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">proj</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">store</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">updated_at</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">version_ref</span>


<div class="viewcode-block" id="accept_translation_records">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.acceptance.accept_translation_records">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">accept_translation_records</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">proj</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">submitted</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">SubmittedRecord</span><span class="p">],</span>
    <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">bundle</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">StatusBundle</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">task</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">TranslationTask</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">submission_translation_version</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">submission_profile</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">enforce_task_version</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">AcceptResult</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Validate and atomically persist a batch of accepted records.</span>

<span class="sd">    Raises :class:`BooktxError` for duplicate / unknown / out-of-task ids and</span>
<span class="sd">    :class:`SubmissionValidationError` when any record fails ERROR-level</span>
<span class="sd">    validation. On success the store is written once and an</span>
<span class="sd">    :class:`AcceptResult` is returned.</span>

<span class="sd">    Note: callers pass a *fresh* ``bundle`` built before acceptance. The</span>
<span class="sd">    returned progress fields reflect a *refreshed* snapshot taken after the</span>
<span class="sd">    store write, matching the historical CLI output exactly.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">submitted</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;empty_submission&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;no records to accept&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">_validate_task_profile</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">proj</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">task</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">submission_profile</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">enforce_task_version</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">version_ref</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_resolved_submission_version</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">proj</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">task</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">task</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">submission_translation_version</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">submission_translation_version</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">version_ref</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">resolve_current_version</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">proj</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">version_ref</span>
    <span class="n">findings</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">validate_submitted_records</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">proj</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">bundle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">submitted</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">task</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">task</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">errors</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_error_findings</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">findings</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">errors</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">SubmissionValidationError</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">errors</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">_updated_at</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">version_ref</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_write_accepted</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">proj</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">bundle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">submitted</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">version_ref</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">version_ref</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">task</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">task</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="c1"># Refresh to report post-accept progress for the first submitted record&#39;s</span>
    <span class="c1"># chapter. This mirrors the original two-pass behavior.</span>
    <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.status</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">build_status_snapshot</span>

    <span class="n">ctx</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">bundle</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">snapshot</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">context</span>
    <span class="n">refreshed</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">build_status_snapshot</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">proj</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">context_exists</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">ctx</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">exists</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">context_ready</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">ctx</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ready</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">first_record_id</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">submitted</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span>
    <span class="n">chapter_id</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">refreshed</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">index</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">record_to_chapter</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">first_record_id</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">chapter</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">refreshed</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">index</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapters_by_id</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">target_words</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">sum</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">count_words</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">item</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">item</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">submitted</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">chapter</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">AcceptResult</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">accepted_records</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">submitted</span><span class="p">),</span>
            <span class="n">target_words</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">target_words</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">version_ref</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">version_ref</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">AcceptResult</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">accepted_records</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">submitted</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">target_words</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">target_words</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">version_ref</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">version_ref</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chapter</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">chapter_title</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chapter</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">title</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">records_translated</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chapter</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">records_translated</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">records_total</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chapter</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">records_total</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">records_remaining</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chapter</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">records_remaining</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="accept_one_record">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.acceptance.accept_one_record">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">accept_one_record</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">proj</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">target</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">bundle</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">StatusBundle</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">task</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">TranslationTask</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">submission_translation_version</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">submission_profile</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">enforce_task_version</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">AcceptResult</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Validate and persist a single accepted record.</span>

<span class="sd">    Equivalent to :func:`accept_translation_records` with one item, but also</span>
<span class="sd">    enforces that a non-empty target was supplied (the single-record command</span>
<span class="sd">    rejects empty targets before reaching the store).</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">target</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">():</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;empty_target&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;empty target for record </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">accept_translation_records</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">proj</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">[</span><span class="n">SubmittedRecord</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nb">id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">target</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">target</span><span class="p">)],</span>
        <span class="n">bundle</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">bundle</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">task</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">task</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">submission_translation_version</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">submission_translation_version</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">submission_profile</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">submission_profile</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">enforce_task_version</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">enforce_task_version</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span></div>

</pre></div>
